title: selaginella epipubens
intro: Selaginella epipubens is a type of ancient, primitive, and rare plant species, known as a 'resurrection plant' due to its unique ability to survive for extended periods without water by forming a dormant state. Traditionally, Selaginella epipubens has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Selaginella epipubens is often prepared for medicinal use in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
